[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01000000 1
1 01110101 5
2 00111100 4
3 00001000 1
4 10011100 4
5 10111101 6
6 10001010 3
7 00010101 3

01 10 01100100 3
12 21 01000000 1 match 0
23 32 00000000 a
34 43 00110100 3
45 54 00001000 1 match 3
56 65 10001000 2
67 76 10011101 5
70 07 01110101 5 match 1

02 20 01000001 2
13 31 00100100 2
24 42 00000000 a
35 53 00000000 a
46 64 00011100 3
57 75 10001010 3 match 6
60 06 00010101 3 match 7
71 17 01101110 5

03 30 00110100 3
14 41 00101100 3
25 52 00000000 a
36 63 00010100 2
47 74 00111100 4 match 2
50 05 00000000 a
61 16 00001100 2
72 27 01000001 2

04 40 00110100 3
15 51 00001010 2
26 62 00000001 1
37 73 00110100 3
